note: Changed writeUsageSummaryHuman signature from (stdout, r) to (stdout, r, by string). The by dimension is now passed by both callers (Usage and UsageAll), which already hold the value. Removed the len(r.Groups) fallback that was the source of the STAGE header bug on empty summaries. usage.go:719–733.

workspaceSnapshot now records fmt.Sprintf("%s\t%d", rel, info.Size()) for every walk entry instead of just the relative path. A rewrite that keeps the path but changes file content will (for any non-trivially-preserved size) change the snapshot and cause the before/after comparison to fail. usage_test.go:802–822.

Added TestUsageSummaryCurrentRunDefault (calls pactum usage with no args when task new has set a current-run pointer; verifies the resolved run id and totals) and TestUsageSummaryNoRunIDNoCurrentRunFails (creates two active runs, removes the current-run pointer to make the resolver ambiguous, verifies non-zero exit and 'run id' in stderr). usage_test.go:771–815.
Advisory (low/cosmetic): empty-state --by label / --by agent test coverage — acknowledged; docs reconciled separately.
